top3.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN g.gender = 'Female' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_female
FROM superhero s
JOIN publisher p ON s.publisher_id = p.id
JOIN gender g ON s.gender_id = g.id
WHERE p.publisher_name = 'George Lucas';

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN g.gender = 'Female' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_female
FROM superhero s
JOIN publisher p ON s.publisher_id = p.id
JOIN gender g ON s.gender_id = g.id
WHERE p.publisher_name = 'George Lucas';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN g.gender = 'Female' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_female
FROM superhero s
JOIN publisher p ON s.publisher_id = p.id
JOIN gender g ON s.gender_id = g.id
WHERE p.publisher_name = 'George Lucas';

SELECT 
    ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN g.gender = 'Female' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) AS percentage_female
FROM superhero s
JOIN publisher p ON s.publisher_id = p.id
JOIN gender g ON s.gender_id = g.id
WHERE p.publisher_name = 'George Lucas';

    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN g.gender = 'Female' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_female
FROM superhero s
JOIN publisher p ON s.publisher_id = p.id
JOIN gender g ON s.gender_id = g.id
WHERE p.publisher_name = 'George Lucas';

JOIN gender g ON s.gender_id = g.id

final.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN g.gender = 'Female' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_female
FROM superhero s
JOIN publisher p ON s.publisher_id = p.id
JOIN gender g ON s.gender_id = g.id
WHERE p.publisher_name = 'George Lucas';
